Spirit Tap  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 150. Max: 210

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 152 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Resist Adjust: -200 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 20 Deletable: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Lifetap Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel your life force drain away.
Cast on other: Soandso staggers.

Game Description

Drains your target of life energy, siphoning between 150 and @1 hit points.

Items with this effect

  • Ancient Ivandyr's Hoop
  • Grim Skull Wand
  • Ivandyr's Hoop
  • Spell: Spirit Tap

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Spirit Tap
ClassLevel
SHD55
NEC26
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (16)
  • Sold By (15)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
New Spell Info...
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2008 at 11:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341839757
Scholar
16 posts
After today's patch (04/17/2008) the spell also gives an emote after it heals you of "You groan and feel a bit weaker". I watched all my stats and nothing went down, I lost no stamina, etc. Not sure what's new but just wanted to give the heads up!
▲ Page top
Acroynyms
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2005 at 4:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591847943481
4 posts
Just because somebody hasnt heard the term DoT, or DD -- does not mean that they are a "dumbass that doesnt know how to play their class". Nowhere in the spell descriptions do they use the terms DoT, etc.. But it DOES describe what they do. So if a person learns how to use their class without the crutch of relying on others to tell them how to do it, I believe they have MORE potential then people who think they are dumbasses for not knowing the correct acrynoyms.
▲ Page top
Acroynyms
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2020 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent

3 posts
Preach

▲ Page top
not to bad
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2005 at 8:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1630283855143
64 posts
as a 56 sk this spell is quite usefull, I have a id4 item and spell crits so getting back 200+hp on a normal cast and 400+hp on a crit is quite nice for argo purposes/getting some lifeback when mob is low hp and running or turning the tide when you/mob are both at 50% and cleric drops.
▲ Page top
aggro
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2005 at 5:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792975978
436 posts
this spell causes a lot of aggro from mob, beware i have died to many times by using this spell
▲ Page top
We were all noobs once
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2005 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591818472574
33 posts
/rant on
Just for everyones information we all started eq some time that makes us all noobs once so picking on someone that doesnt know what DD or DoT means, or HoT or CH or anything like that doesnt mean there stupid like WTF< who thinks of that LoL or that or stfu get the drift. No one knows what abbreviations are untill they ask or someone corrects them in a kind manor.
/rant off
▲ Page top
bad posting on damage
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2005 at 11:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780198124
19 posts
only hits for up to 150 not 200 like it says
▲ Page top
RE: bad posting on damage
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2005 at 11:56 PM Rating: Decent
Tasen
22 posts
Your thinking of Siphon Life, the level 20 tap
▲ Page top
dd/dot
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2005 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591820263761
1 post
dd = direct damage : DOT = Damage over time
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 11 2004 at 1:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) If you cant understand what a DOT or DD spell is by level 29, then maybe you should make a warrior to start the game like everyone else, and then once you pick up some terms or learn stuff from other casters, that you group with, then go ahead and make a necro, or whatever. cause I really dont want to group with a dumb@ss that doesn't know how to play their toon. So please do us all a favor and make a warrior, all you have to do is click attack, then click taunt repeatedly. Take care all.
RE: LOL
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2005 at 11:49 PM Rating: Decent
Tasen
22 posts
That's funny, seeing as how playing a warrior well (and by well I mean always keeping agro, almost never letting the cleric or slower die, and getting agro from the puller before the mob hits the puller and such things) is easir than kiting. But then I have only kited with Druids and Rangers so I may lack understanding of the finer intricacies of necro kiting. In the higher levels, really good warriors, or tanks of any kind, are hard to come by. Now you as a rogue (and I'm assuming you play a rogue seeing as your sig says *Ruthless Backstabber*) really do only click attack, and backstab, and evade occasionally, so perhaps instead of saying someone that doesn't know how to play their class (not that knowing other people acronyms is really needed to play a soloing class like a necro) should play a warrior, you should tell then to play a rogue, like yourself.
▲ Page top
agreed
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2004 at 11:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793082970
13 posts
I would have to agree with skeet their, you are going to say you hate their explainations yet you arnt even going to explain it easier for "noobs" who dont know what that means
